summary: Comprehensive testing of CloudPulse FinOps platform after Bearer token auth fix completed. Backend APIs 93.8% success rate, frontend UI 100% functional. The auth fix successfully resolved the httpOnly cookie forwarding issue through K8s ingress. All user-facing features working perfectly.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 due to budget exceeded for AI service
flaky_endpoints.impact: AI recommendation generation not working due to budget limits

passed_tests: Admin login with Bearer token authentication (admin@cloudpulse.io)
User registration with Bearer token return and redirect to dashboard
Dashboard KPIs display (90 resources, 11 waste, $3,698.74 savings)
Dashboard charts render (cost trend, waste gauge, resource breakdown)
Resources page with table of 90 AWS resources and filtering
Recommendations page with 12 recommendation cards displaying properly
Cost Explorer with comprehensive cost data ($11,816.68 total, $50,811.72 projected)
Remediation page with status counters (0 pending, 0 approved, 0 rejected)
GreenOps page with carbon footprint data loading
All sidebar navigation between pages working
Logout functionality and redirect to login
Protected route access control after logout
Bearer token storage in localStorage and Authorization header usage
All backend API endpoints except AI generation (budget limited)
RBAC role-based access control with Bearer tokens
